query_intent: Compare day-of-week sales between 1998 and 1999 by week sequence using combined web and catalog sales, returning per-day sales ratios for week pairs exactly 53 weeks apart.

dag_nodes.intent: Combine web and catalog sales into a shared stream of (sold_date_sk, sales_price) rows so both channels are analyzed together.
Aggregate the combined sales stream to weekly totals split into Sunday-through-Saturday sales buckets.
Build 1998 and 1999 weekly views from the weekly bucketed totals, align weeks separated by 53, and compute day-by-day sales ratios with two-decimal rounding.
